system.effect: This ritual allows the sorcerer to teleport themselves and three people per level of Sorcery skill up to 1000km away. Having Sorcery-0 means only the caster can teleport themselves. The targets can resist this spell with an END/10+ throw, with the caster's Sorcery skill level as a DM penalty (e.g. targets of a level-1 Sorcery teleportation spell need to make an END/11+ roll). The targets and all their possessions are teleported instantly. If desired, the sorcerer may teleport 100kg of items instead of one person. The destination must be a place the sorcerer has observed or visited in the past: scrying and other magical means of far-seeing suffice for purposes of determining valid destinations. Teleportation cannot be Channeled.
system.critSuccess: The teleportation range is increased to 5000km away, and the number of additional targets is doubled.
